title: Geo Expansion
description: Geo Expansion a geology mod and a biome mod.
body:
Geo Expansion is now Updated to 1.21.8

Geo Expansion is a Geology Based mod adding over 50 stone types, over 1000 crafting recipes, and a new Biomes, 

Geo Expansion is based off of the Bettergeo mod and UnEarthed mod and based off of Terrafirmacraft mod and inspired by Vintage Story game, Geo Expansion mod is a different mod than geologic Expansion mod 

Geo expansion is a geology based mod and a biome mod.

Recommended mods with Geo Expansion, lithosphere mod, Biomes o plenty mod, Sophisticated backpacks mod.

(Slab Gen Update part 1) Geo Expansion 1.9.1
(Slab Gen Update part 2) Geo Expansion 1.9.2
